description: Lightweight Codex workflow for small code or documentation changes when no dedicated workflow applies. It implements with Codex GPT-5.5 high effort, reviews the diff, and loops back only for high or middle findings.

prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep changed files, findings, feedback, verification commands, and routing decisions explicit.

steps.description: Make the requested small code or documentation change, or address the latest high or middle review feedback on rerun.
Review the implementation and route back only when high or middle findings remain.
Publish the accepted simple-work result after review reports no high or middle findings.

rielaPackage.title: codex-simple-work-package
rielaPackage.description: Lightweight Codex workflow for small code or documentation changes when no dedicated workflow applies. It implements with Codex GPT-5.5 high effort, reviews the diff, and loops back only for high or middle findings.
